items.label: AACR • 2024
items.title: Fast, Interactive, AI-Assisted 3D Lung Tumor Segmentation
items.description: Presented a fast, interactive AI-assisted 3D lung tumor segmentation approach for clinical CT imaging.

items.label: AACR • 2023
items.title: Improving Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer Segmentation on a Challenging Dataset
items.description: Presented segmentation methods that improved performance on challenging non-small cell lung cancer cohorts.

items.label: AACR • 2021
items.title: Leveraging Graphs to Do Hypothesis & Data-Driven Research Using Multiplex Immunofluorescence Images
items.description: Presented graph-based methods for hypothesis- and data-driven research using multiplex immunofluorescence images.
